programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Glitters: Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. Thrifty shopper and amateur sleuth Jennifer sifts through sparkly clues when the owner of a storage unit full of antique items is murdered. (2014)
A one-night romance with a handsome soldier throws a woman's life into chaos as his attraction turns out to be a frightening obsession. Starring Jamie Luner.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Obsessive drama with Mia Rose Frampton. A troubled high school student meets a teacher who offers to help her avoid probation, but her methods prove unethical, disturbing and ultimately deadly (2015).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Honeymoon, Honeymurder: Murder mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Newly-married Aurora and Nick's lakeside getaway takes a decidedly unromantic turn when they discover a body in the water. (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Honeymoon, Honeymurder: Murder mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Newly-married Aurora and Nick's lakeside getaway takes a decidedly unromantic turn when they discover a body in the water. (2021)
A Fine Meth: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Hollander's Woods: Whilst investigating a death in the woods, Castle is confronted with a defining event from his childhood that's haunted him for decades.
...Dente: Crime drama with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu when a new restaurant hires an Italian chef. Henry and Maggie investigate but each meal could be their last. (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Dente: Crime drama with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu when a new restaurant hires an Italian chef. Henry and Maggie investigate but each meal could be their last. (2016)
Fatal Impact: Part 1: Amanda and Dr Sloan help the F.B.I investigate a tragic, fatal plane crash near Community General. Jesse discovers that two passengers are unaccounted for. Part 1 of 2.
Fatal Impact: Part 2: The complex investigation into the tragic plane crash continues. Will Dr Sloan's recollection of an incident from 20-years-ago help to solve the case? Part 2 of 2.
Kendo Killing: Jessica travels to Japan to conduct a series of lectures at a local university. Can she solve the murder of a motorcycle racer?
Death Goes Double Platinum: Jessica becomes embroiled in the music industry when she attempts to help an up-and-coming band. But will a New York mobster get his own way?
Billy The Kid: Jack investigates the shooting of a respected judge after his protégé is charged with the crime; Lucy fears her mother's new fiancé isn't who he claims to be.
Xy: There are different sides to every story in this two-parter. The explosive chain of events that follow a phone call is first told from Castle's perspective in this season premiere.
The Comeback: Carrie believes she may have discovered the identity of the anonymous caller who was behind a series of sniper attacks in the city.
Gilted Lily: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...Newlywed and Dead: Mystery starring Alexa PenaVega. When a groom is murdered mid-wedding, it's up to the quick-thinking photographer to snap the clues and catch the killer. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Newlywed and Dead: Mystery starring Alexa PenaVega. When a groom is murdered mid-wedding, it's up to the quick-thinking photographer to snap the clues and catch the killer. (2019)
Room: When her friend dies in a house rumoured to be cursed, can amateur sleuth Jennifer get to the truth without becoming the next victim? (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Room: When her friend dies in a house rumoured to be cursed, can amateur sleuth Jennifer get to the truth without becoming the next victim? (2015)
Thriller with Kelli Williams. A suburban mother is getting back on track after being released from jail when her former cellmate turns up, forcing her to re-enter the world she just escaped (2017).

Thriller starring Rachael Leigh Cook. A brilliant engineer's design is stolen and patented by her colleague. When he's found murdered, she becomes the prime suspect and must fight for her life (2011).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Haunted By Murder: Spooky mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Aida plans to flip a house where a teenage Aurora once discovered a body. The death was deemed accidental - but was it really? (2022)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Haunted By Murder: Spooky mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Aida plans to flip a house where a teenage Aurora once discovered a body. The death was deemed accidental - but was it really? (2022)
Gilted Lily: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Xy: There are different sides to every story in this two-parter. The explosive chain of events that follow a phone call is first told from Castle's perspective in this season premiere.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
Must Kill TV: Dr Sloan and Steve investigate when Amanda discovers a television executive may not have died of natural causes.
Discards: Jesse is shocked to discover the truth about his estranged father's secretive past after they are targeted by an assassin during a fishing trip.
Murder In Tempo: Jessica investigates when a musician's murder disrupts preparations for a benefit concert organised by Dr Hazlitt.
Dark Side Of The Door: Jessica is alerted to the similarities of a new novel and her friend's kidnapping over a decade before. Can Jessica establish a link and prove her friend's innocence?
Girl Who Signed Wolf: Sue unearths a sinister poisoning plot while investigating a 12-year-olds girl's claim that she witnessed a kidnapping.
XX: In the second part of this two-part season premiere Beckett is left fighting for her life. It's an unexpected tip from her past which leads her to uncover exactly who wants her dead.
Allegiances: Carrie's latest investigation unearths the possibility that her boyfriend's family has connections to the prime suspects in a murder case.
In My Humboldt Opinion: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...Prediction Murder: Mystery starring Taylor Cole. A reporter and detective reunite to crack a new case - this time delving into the secrets surrounding a murdered local psychic. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Prediction Murder: Mystery starring Taylor Cole. A reporter and detective reunite to crack a new case - this time delving into the secrets surrounding a murdered local psychic. (2020)

...Wedding Dress: Murder mystery with Lori Loughlin. When she finds a bloodstained wedding dress with a strange backstory, second-hand sleuth Jennifer must lift the veil on a decades-old crime. (2015)
